title: ICanGamez Vanity Blocks
description:
This allows for a bit more Varity of average minecraft blocks!
Adds lots of newly needed blocks such as glowing crystals and More Flower/Flowering Blocks!
body:
This mod adds a Multitude of different Blocks using the stonecutter.
Adding vanilla friendly blocks that fit into the game amazingly
Apply one of these blocks to the stone cutter and you will get one of the custom blocks!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Vines
Any Stone
Moss Block
Colored Glass
Cobblestone
Fire charge
Iron
Stick
Amethyst
Blue Ice
Oak Wood
Carpet
Web

</details>
Made By ICanGamez
